prompt: Create a high-impact Japanese YouTube thumbnail in a flashy internet-marketing style, 16:9 landscape, with an explosive black-and-gold background filled with sparkles, lens flares, glowing particles, and dramatic light streaks. The composition is dense and energetic, with giant layered typography dominating the left and center, and an anime-style male character on the right. At the very top, place a curved red ribbon banner with gold trim and bold white-and-yellow Japanese text reading 実績者が教える. Below it, make the main headline extremely large, glossy, and three-dimensional with heavy black outlines and gold glow: a huge metallic gold "10", followed by bold white "日で", then a giant neon green glowing "X", then stacked white text "収益化", and at the bottom the largest gold text "達成". Behind the headline, add a bright green upward-trending bar graph with an arrow pointing to the upper right to symbolize growth. On the left side, include 3 social-and-money elements: a tilted black smartphone displaying the white X logo, a green chat bubble with a white heart, and a smaller green chat bubble with a white user silhouette. At the lower left, add 2 stacks of shiny gold coins and 1 gold coin with a yen symbol. On the right side, show 1 anime-style young man from about thigh-up, with messy dark brown hair accented by vivid green streaks, fair skin, and a confident pose with crossed arms, wearing a black jacket with green inner clothing; his face area is obscured by a simple rectangular blur block. Near his lower right side, place 1 gold award seal with laurel decoration and a small crown, containing the Japanese text "成功者続出", and attach a red ribbon across the bottom of the seal with the text "再現性あり". Along the bottom, place 3 glowing green rectangular feature boxes with gold borders and black interiors. The first box contains 1 beginner mark icon and the text "X初心者でも 簡単収益化". The second box contains 1 clock icon and the text "1日1時間の 作業でOK". The third box contains 1 calendar icon with a green check and the text "最短10日で 収益化条件達成". Use oversized bold Japanese fonts, metallic gold gradients, white text with thick black stroke, vivid neon green highlights, extreme contrast, and a polished click-through-rate optimized thumbnail aesthetic.
